zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Drury於大約1365年出生時，他的父親Nicholas Drury27歲，母親Joan de Saxham26歲。他於大約1414年與Joan Hethe在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1454年享年90歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可瑟斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Drury于大约1365年出生时，他的父亲Nicholas Drury27岁，母亲Joan de Saxham26岁。他于大约1414年与Joan Hethe在英国素福爾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1454年享年90岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可瑟斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Drury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Drury was born about 1365, his father, Nicholas Drury, was 27 and his mother, Joan de Saxham, was 26. He married Joan Hethe about 1414, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1454, at the age of 90, and was buried in Thurston, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Drury est né environ 1365, son père, Nicholas Drury, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan de Saxham, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Joan Hethe environ 1414, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1454, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterré à Thurston, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Drury um 1365 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Drury 27 und seine Mutter Joan de Saxham 26. Er hat um 1414 in Suffolk, England Joan Hethe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1454 im Alter von 90 Jahren und wurde in Thurston, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Drury è nato il circa 1365, il suo padre, Nicholas Drury, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Saxham, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Joan Hethe circa 1414, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1454, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolto a Thurston, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Druryが約1365年に生まれた時，父Nicholas Druryは27歳，母Joan de Saxhamは26歳であった。約1414年にイギリススフォルクでJoan Hetheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1454年に90歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクスウルストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Drury(이)가 대략 1365년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Drury(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Saxham(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1414년 영국 수폴크에서 Joan Hethe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1454년 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 스르스턴에 묻혔다.

mn.Ickworth, Suffolk, EnglandIckworth, Suff: Ickworth, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Drury nasceu aproximadamente 1365, seu pai, Nicholas Drury, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Saxham, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Hethe aproximadamente 1414, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1454, com 90 anos, e foi sepultado em Thurston, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Drury родился около 1365 г., его отцу по имени Nicholas Drury было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Saxham, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Hethe около 1414 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1454 г. в возрасте 90 лет и был похоронен в местности турстон, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Drury nació aproximadamente 1365, su papá, Nicholas Drury, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joan de Saxham, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Joan Hethe aproximadamente 1414, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1454, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultado en Thurston, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
